rapidcointrades Market

Withdraw money from your account to anywhere in the world with our card in any ATM around you. Invest in plan B, C or D to qualitfy for applying AstrofX1.compremium cards.

Know More

Why rapidcointrades Market?

  • Legal Company

    rapidcointrades Market is an company registered in the United Kingdom providing its investment services to the members all around the world.

  • Customer Support

    We understand how important having reliable support service is to you. Please don't hesitate to contact us should you have any questions or concerns and we will get back to you in no time.

  • Security

    All data on financial operations as well as personal data are effectively protected with EV SSL certificates and additional services on encryption of data transfer.

  • Privacy

    We don't require identity verification. Information about your activity on the website is private and can't be accessed by third parties.

About rapidcointrades Market

rapidcointrades Market is a legally operating company in the UK (#05372427). We were one of the first to invest in cryptocurrencies. rapidcointrades Market is a leading blockchain investment company.
Our mission is to act as a catalyst for universal adoption and blockchain innovation.
We focus only on investing in blockchain technologies. Our team has experience in both traditional financing and emerging blockchain technology.

Our Office Overview

  • George Aguilar

    I decided to Invest some dollars hoping i will get my profit as stated on the website. The interesting part is when i saw my money growing. I picked the Delux Weekly Plan. And i was just surprised. This is too real to be true. I was then contacted by an admin to write a testimonial about the platform in which i gladly did. rapidcointrades Market is a real deal.

  • Charlie Copp

    It is very easy to make investments on this site. They have different payment gateways that are secured and easy to use. I have also earned from their referal program. I upgraded my membership plan to Delux and it has been fun with lots of features added to my account. One thing i must say is you don't need money to start making money from this site. Thanks.
